mapper.sql: FROM TADMIN_MST_ME A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_URSCR B ON B.APKEY = A.APKEY AND B.USKEY = A.USKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ME C ON C.MEKEY = A.UPRMEKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MSG D ON D.MULAAPMSGHDKEY = A.MENM AND D.MSGTYPE = 'MENU' LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MSG E ON E.MULAAPMSGHDKEY = C.MENM AND E.MSGTYPE = 'MENU'
mapper.delete: /* adm-menu-menu-sql-oracle.xml - deleteMenu */ UPDATE TADMIN_MST_ME SET DELYN = 'Y' WHERE MEKEY IN ( WITH RECURSIVE del_tree AS ( SELECT MEKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ME WHERE MEKEY = #{mekey} AND DELYN = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT m.MEKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ME m INNER JOIN del_tree d ON m.UPRMEKEY = d.MEKEY ) SELECT MEKEY FROM del_tree )
